description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden shelving unit with a dark brown finish, featuring a combination of open shelves and two lower cabinet doors. The upper section consists of four main shelves, some of which are divided into smaller compartments, providing versatile storage options for books, decor, or other items. The lower section is enclosed by two panel doors, likely concealing additional storage space. The sides and back are solid, with no visible openings or decorative elements. The overall design is simple and functional, with a slightly rustic or industrial aesthetic. This piece would be suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, garages, or communal spaces.
description: A tall, dark brown wooden shelving unit with open shelves and two lower cabinet doors, offering versatile storage and a simple, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing open shelves with varied compartments and two lower cabinet doors.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, flat side panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid back panel with no openings or details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a solid, featureless panel.
